name: Copying firmware files to the Device Tree - Mediatek

name: Is TWRP OS-version specific?
snippet: May 12, 2020 — Yes, TWRP is built OS- version specific the reason is changes in android versions may differ in most (if not all) updates are backwards compatible. Read more

name: TWRP replaced by /e/ Recovery after install
snippet: Nov 3, 2022 — Hi! I have installed /e/ with success using TWRP in Samsung S9. Although now the TWRP has been replaced by the /e/ Recovery without asking.

name: Development - [Recovery] TWRP for Android 12, 13 and 14
snippet: Oct 28, 2023 — This TWRP can decrypt Android 12 , 13 and 14 AOSP roms, havent tested with MIUI or custom MIUI roms tested with: - evolution x 14 - voltageos 14 - AOSPA 14 Read more

name: TWRP 3.7.0 Released -- with Android 12 support
snippet: 3.6 and 3.7 fixed issues with Android 11 and 12 and now support both those versions . 3.7.1 twrp in beta supports android 13 . Read more

name: support fscrypt policies v1 and v2 (3570)
snippet: FsCrypt update : support fscrypt policies v1 and v2 This patchset introduces support decryption for Android 11 . In this update we deprecate ext4crypt. Read more

name: Online TWRP Builder
snippet: Which devices are supported? ... It supports all devices capable of installing TWRP recovery running on Android 5.1, 6, 7, 8, 8.1, 9, 10, 11 , 12 , 13 or 14 + . Read more
